TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Anthony_Bonner, title = Anthony_Bonner, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anthony_Bonner} }

S.FORM: Anthony Bonner 6 bulad 8 demiad, 1968 a mihca, Anthony Bonner, miunduay.
S.PHON: antħonj bonnər * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, antħonj bonnər, miunduaj.
